nodes.label: LightRAG Ollama Compatibility Interface Test Script  This script tests the Light

Run a test and record the results     Args:         func: Test function

Create request data for error testing     Args:         error_type: Error type,
Test error handling for streaming responses      Test scenarios:     1. Empty me
